description_long: This is a compact, modern two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent front balcony covered by a wooden pergola adorned with lush green foliage. The front facade features an open lower level with a small entryway and a partially enclosed upper balcony, while the rear and side walls are clad in dark horizontal siding with minimal windows. The house includes large rectangular windows on one side, providing natural light to the interior, and a small potted plant near the entrance adds a touch of greenery. The roof is flat and features several skylights or roof hatches, suggesting a focus on maximizing interior daylight. The structure is supported by wooden columns at the front, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor space. The house appears to be constructed primarily from wood, concrete, and glass, with a modern urban aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, front balcony with pergola, dark siding, and large windows on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lower entry, upper balcony with pergola and greenery, and visible interior details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark horizontal siding, minimal windows, and the extension of the pergola and balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, a single window, and a clear view of the flat roof and skylights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying two large rectangular windows and the side profile of the balcony and pergola.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows on one side
attribute_entryway_design: Open entry with a small porch, wooden columns, and an upper balcony with a pergola and greenery
